aiLatencyObservations.surface: Cloud Run direct supervisor general coding warn metadata

expertAssessments.rationale: The changed metadata contract was covered by targeted local tests, full AI Engine tests, root contract tests, and production warn/block probes.
The live/current fact path remains deterministic with zero token usage, while the best-effort coding warn path now exposes structured metadata without changing user-facing guardrail text.
The previously noted non-blocking observability gap is closed in production: warn-path metadata now includes offDomainAction=warn and offDomainCategory=general_coding.
Frontend and Cloud Run production both reached v8.12.89, Cloud Run serves 100% traffic on ai-engine-00592-47p, and runtime limits remain within free-tier policy.

usageChecks.summary: Current Vercel billing period reviewed after v8.12.89 off-domain warn metadata production QA; effective 1.9358 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 1827.

completedImprovements.title: v8.12.89 off-domain warn metadata exposed and verified on Cloud Run production
completedImprovements.evidence: Production v8.12.89 returned offDomainAction=warn/offDomainCategory=general_coding for the general coding warn path, while the live fact block path still returned deterministic usage 0.

notes: Production frontend and Cloud Run AI Engine are both serving v8.12.89.
GitLab pipeline API lookup returned 401 locally; pipeline id 2576980796 was verified via production /api/version after deploy.
The first Cloud Run direct metadata calls hit transient DNS EAI_AGAIN in the sandbox and passed after an approved external retry.
The previous non-blocking observability gap for warn-path metadata is closed in production.
